queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between the absence of a checking account and reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical impact of checking account balances below zero on the mitigation of credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: between 4 and 7 years.
queries.question: Empirical evidence on the contribution of employment duration between four and seven years to decreased credit risk.
